goal_text:
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should 'arrive by 18:00' and should leave on 'tuesday'.
The train should depart from 'stansted airport' and should go to 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'travel time' and 'departure time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for a train. The train should arrive by 18:00 and should leave on tuesday
The train should depart from stansted airport and should go to cambridge
Make sure you get travel time and departure time
